scripts.deploy: rsync -avz --delete --exclude=node_modules --exclude=xml-archives --exclude=statmanager.ini --exclude=.git --exclude=db/testdata --exclude='Design Notes' --exclude=samples -e 'ssh -p 220' ./ vaughanp@192.168.86.33:/volume1/web/statmanager/ && ssh -p 220 vaughanp@192.168.86.33 'PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH pm2 restart statmanager'
